query_normalized: predicting individual pain sensitivity from resting‑state eeg microstates neuroscience
rationale: The paper studies resting‑state EEG (independent variable) to predict a pain‑related outcome (chronic knee pain), which falls within the same domain of EEG‑based pain prediction as the user’s interest in individual pain sensitivity (acceptance criterion (b)). It therefore provides a relevant empirical baseline for EEG‑based pain prediction methods.
